justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified 'next Friday' as May 29th and the preferred time 'around 9 am' as 9:00 to 10:00.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information in the first turn and booked the appointment in the second, without any redundant questions or calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the request and confirming the booking.
